1.title: raft-proxy.spring.security.authorizations
1.query:
timeseries authorizations = avg(raft-proxy.spring.security.authorizations),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(authorizations) desc
| limit 20

2.title: raft-proxy.spring.security.filterchains
2.query:
timeseries filterchains = avg(raft-proxy.spring.security.filterchains),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(filterchains) desc
| limit 20
